    B

    Bid - Class in whistapp.domain.bids
    Abstract class representing the current Round's bid (not a player's bid)
    Bid(ArrayList) - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.bids.Bid
    A constructor for an abstract bid.
    biddingStabilised() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A function that parses the round bidtype, when everyone has picked a bid.
    bidFromString(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple function that transforms a string representation of a bid into an enum value.
    bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration(String) - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A getter that returns true if the given bid name equates to a bid that requires a trump to be declared at bid time.
    bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A simple getter that returns true if the given bid name equates to a bid that requires a trump to be declared at bid time.
    bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
     
    BidType - Enum Class in whistapp.domain.bids
    Enum for the different types of bids during the bidding phase of the game.
    BotDifficulty - Enum Class in whistapp.domain.players
    An enumeration of the available bot difficulty levels in the game.
    BotPlayer - Class in whistapp.domain.players
    Represents a bot player in the game of Whist.
    BotPlayer(String) - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.players.BotPlayer
